name: codex-autoresearch
description: One Codex skill for measured autoresearch loops: set up or resume, run packets, log decisions, use the live dashboard, and finalize kept changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run measured Codex loops from one plugin skill
interface.longDescription: Codex Autoresearch gives Codex one skill surface for the full loop: onboard a human or AI agent, start or resume a measured session, lint benchmark METRIC output, convert deep research into quality_gap checkpoints, run next_experiment packets, log keep/discard/crash/checks_failed decisions with ASI, keep the live dashboard open, and split kept work into clean review branches.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Autoresearch to improve this repo.
Plan an Autoresearch loop from this prompt.
Open the live dashboard and continue.
